sub_modules.fp_unpack: Extracts IEEE-754 sign, exponent, fraction, significand, and operand class flags.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, zero, signed-zero, and invalid infinity cancellation cases.
sub_modules.fp_align: Selects the larger-magnitude operand and right-shifts the smaller significand with guard, round, and sticky information.
sub_modules.fp_addsub_significands: Adds or subtracts aligned significands according to effective operand signs and detects exact cancellation.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round_pack: Normalizes the arithmetic result, applies round-to-nearest-even, detects overflow, and packs IEEE-754 output.
